narrative: Hot US PPI and robust UK GDP data drive G8 price action — GBP/USD holds 1.3518 as Q1 growth beats expectations, while USD/JPY firms to 157.92 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. AUD leads the G8 (+0.868% avg) against a lagging JPY (-0.644% avg) with a 1.512% spread; gold lower -0.15%; equities +0.58%; DXY -0.02%; VIX 17.8. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27 for the next G8 policy catalyst.
